title: Birkirkara, Birkirkara District — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Birkirkara, Birkirkara District: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Birkirkara is a city in Birkirkara District with a population of 25,000. Malta’s largest town, a bustling commercial and residential center with a historic basilica, a lively market, and a central location in the island’s urban core.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
